summary: This source is an Amazon product page for a third-party book about Elon Musk's mindset. It contains marketing copy describing his use of first principles thinking, but lacks direct quotes, detailed frameworks, or primary insights from Musk himself.

mental_models.name: First Principles Thinking
mental_models.description: A reasoning system used to reduce complex problems to their elemental truths and build solutions from the ground up, rather than relying on traditional assumptions.

anti_patterns.why_it_fails: Traditional assumptions obscure innovation and prevent building ideas from the ground up.
